name: J1939TestChkCreate_ACLViolation
title: J1939TestChkCreate_ACLViolation
syntax: long J1939TestChkCreate_ACLViolation( dbNode sender, dword timeout, dword options )
description: Observes the Address Claiming of a node. The specified node must respond to a Request for ACL.
Optionally the check allows sending other messages, only if an ACL message (0xEE00) of the node is received first.
